# Favicon Notes

This directory is served at the root of the site (`/`).

To comply with Google's favicon guidelines and ensure that the Cinemorix logo
appears in search results, you must provide the following image files in this
folder:

- `favicon.ico` (contains one or more standard sizes, typically 16x16 / 32x32)
- `favicon-32x32.png` (32×32 PNG version of the logo)
- `favicon-16x16.png` (16×16 PNG version of the logo)
- `apple-touch-icon.png` (typically 180×180 PNG for iOS)
- `favicon.svg` (optional vector fallback, already present)

**Important:** replace these placeholder files with the official Cinemorix
logo graphics. Tools such as [RealFaviconGenerator](https://realfavicongenerator.net/)
or any image editor can be used to export the correct dimensions.

After uploading the new icons, clear any caches and resubmit the site in
Google Search Console; the new favicons will be detected automatically if they
are accessible from the root (e.g. `https://cinemorix.com/favicon.ico`).

Any Lovable or default icons previously used should be removed from this
folder to avoid unintended branding.
